mapper.select: SELECT b.nb_basket, b.id_user, bi.nb_basket_item, bi.cn_basket_item_order, bi.no_product , p.nm_product, bi.qt_basket_item_price , bi.qt_basket_item , bi.qt_basket_item_amount FROM tb_basket b JOIN tb_basket_item bi ON b.nb_basket = bi.nb_basket JOIN tb_product p ON bi.no_product = p.no_product WHERE b.id_user=#{userId} ORDER BY bi.cn_basket_item_order ASC
